sections.overview: Hero area with design service branding and image carousel

sequences.description: Eyebrow text 'DESIGN SERVICE', large heading 'Always Free. Always Inspired.', bold subtitle about offerings (in-store, in-home, virtual design consultations)
Full-width auto-playing image carousel showing designer-curated room photos with click-to-chat links, navigation arrows and dots

sections.overview: Value proposition heading with appointment CTA

sequences.description: Centered heading 'From floorplans to finishing touches, we have solutions for every space, any size.' followed by a primary 'Book An Appointment' button

sections.overview: Two side-by-side full-width image carousels of 3D room renderings

sequences.description: Grid of two full-width carousel sliders, each containing 6 product/room 3D rendering images with links to product pages, navigation arrows and pagination dots

sections.overview: Design project spotlights carousel with vertical images and project titles

sequences.description: Named carousel with heading 'Design Project Spotlights' showing vertical image cards - each card has a project photo and linked title (Easy Lake Living, Downsizing, New Construction, Mountain Retreat, Family Friendly) with navigation arrows

sections.overview: Featured project video with product recommendations

sequences.description: Split layout: left side has an auto-playing video of a design project, right side has eyebrow 'OUR LATEST PROJECT', heading 'Rooted in Comfort', description paragraph about Cedar Park TX project
Small product carousel labeled 'Shop the look' showing related furniture items from the featured project

Expandable accordion with 8 FAQ items: 'What do I get with the Havertys Free Design Service?', 'What does a Havertys Designer Expert do?', 'How do I get started?', 'Do I need an appointment?', 'What type of appointment should I make?', 'What can I expect during my personalized design presentation?', 'What is my Sales Consultant role in the design process?', 'How long should I expect the design process to take?'
Styled blockquote with decorative quote marks: 'My designer worked with me to customize a space that I've always wanted. Best of all the design help was free. Win. Win.' attributed to '-Bella'

sections.overview: Two promotional cards for customization and room planning

sequences.description: Grid of two card-style commerce teasers, each with: product image, heading, description paragraph, and CTA button. Card 1: 'Customize Something One-of-a-Kind' with 'Learn More' link. Card 2: 'Envision Your Space' with 'Get Started' link
Full-width banner with heading 'GET EXCLUSIVE ACCESS', subtitle 'Be the first to know about offers, inspiration, and new products.', and 'Sign Up' button linking to signup modal
Long-form SEO paragraph with bold heading 'Free Design Service' followed by detailed description of the design service process, with inline links to room planning tool and store locations
